_meta.description: Skills discovered during step 0 (initial rollout, 4 episodes per power)

AUSTRIA.name: Adjustment Setup
AUSTRIA.description: Transitions the game phase from W1903A to S1904M while maintaining other world state predicates.

steps: Assess current layout for setup opportunities
Place elements to prepare for future gains
Remove: world.phase=S1904M, world.phase=W1903A, world.units=A SER, A BOH, A GAL, F ADR

eff_add: world.units=A BOH, A VIE, F APU, A BUD
world.units=A SER, A BOH, A VIE, F APU
eff_del: world.units=A SER, A BOH, A GAL, F ADR

AUSTRIA.name: Late Orders Defend
AUSTRIA.description: The 'late_orders:DEFEND' skill changes the game phase, centers, and units, and triggers events related to phase and center changes.

AUSTRIA.name: Late Orders Setup
AUSTRIA.description: The 'late_orders:SETUP' skill transitions Austria's centers and phase, reducing centers from 3 or 4 to 2 and advancing the game phase.

steps: Reduce Austria's center count from 3 or 4 to 2 by moving units to adjacent territories
Advance the game phase to the next stage using the phase advancement button
Confirm the phase change and center reduction in the game interface
success_criteria: Austria's center count is reduced to 2
Game phase has advanced to the next stage
No errors reported during the phase transition

AUSTRIA.name: Opening Explore
AUSTRIA.description: The 'opening:EXPLORE' skill increases Austria's centers to 4 and transitions phases, updating units and phase states during the early game.

eff_del: world.units=A BUD, A VIE, F TRI

AUSTRIA.name: Orders Explore
AUSTRIA.description: The EXPLORE skill increases Austria's centers by 1 and advances the game phase from F1902M to W1902A.

AUSTRIA.name: Orders Setup
AUSTRIA.description: The 'orders:SETUP' skill transitions the game phase and increases the number of centers for Austria, indicating setup of strategic positioning and movement.

steps: Select Austria's center units and move them to strategic positions
Assign movement orders to Austria's units to secure key locations
Confirm all movement orders are executed and units are in place
success_criteria: Austria has successfully positioned its units in strategic locations
Game phase transitions to the next phase
Number of Austria's centers has increased as expected

ENGLAND.name: Adjustment Setup
ENGLAND.description: The 'adjustment:SETUP' skill changes the game phase and unit configurations, updating centers and phase states while modifying unit assignments.

steps: Assess current layout for setup opportunities
Place elements to prepare for future gains

eff_del: world.units=F YOR, A EDI, F NWY

ENGLAND.name: Late Orders Defend
ENGLAND.description: The 'late_orders:DEFEND' skill reduces England's centers from 4 to 3, advances the phase from F1906M to S1907M, and changes unit positions.

eff_add: world.units=F LON, A WAL, F BEL

ENGLAND.name: Late Orders Setup
ENGLAND.description: The 'late_orders:SETUP' skill increases England's centers from 4 to 5 and advances the game phase to later periods (W1906A, W1907A, S1908M), while removing earlier phase indicators.

steps: Increase England's centers to 5 using the center_upgrade action
Advance game phase to W1906A using the phase_advance action
Remove all phase indicators from the game board using the clear_phase_indicators action
success_criteria: Game phase is advanced to W1906A
All earlier phase indicators are removed

eff_add: world.units=A EDI, A LON, F SKA, F NWG
world.units=A EDI, F SKA, F NWG, A YOR
eff_del: world.units=A EDI, F NTH, A LON, F SKA
world.units=F NWY, A EDI, F NTH, A LON

ENGLAND.name: Opening Explore
ENGLAND.description: The 'EXPLORE' skill increases England's centers from 3 to 4 and changes the phase from S1901M to S1903M, while updating and modifying unit configurations.

eff_add: world.units=F LON, A EDI, F SKA
eff_del: world.units=F EDI, F LON, A LVP
world.units=F LON, A LVP, F NTH
world.units=F LON, F NTH, A EDI

ENGLAND.name: Orders Setup
ENGLAND.description: The 'orders:SETUP' skill increases the number of centers from 3 to 4 and advances the game phase through multiple turns, while modifying unit configurations.

steps: Assess current layout for setup opportunities
Place elements to prepare for future gains

eff_del: world.units=F EDI, F LON, A LVP

FRANCE.name: Adjustment Defend
FRANCE.description: The 'adjustment:DEFEND' skill increases the number of centers to 6, changes the phase to F1906M and W1906A, and updates the units list.

eff_del: world.units=A BRE, A MAR, A POR, F LYO

FRANCE.name: Late Orders Defend
FRANCE.description: Transitions the game phase from F1905M to S1906M while maintaining other state predicates.

eff_add: world.units=A GAS, A PIC, F TUN, F BRE
world.units=A GAS, A PIC, F TUN, F MAO
world.units=F TUN, F MAO, A BRE, A BEL
eff_del: world.units=A GAS, A BRE, F MAO
world.units=A GAS, A BRE, F NAF
world.units=A GAS, A PIC, F WES

FRANCE.name: Late Orders Setup
FRANCE.description: The 'late_orders:SETUP' skill increases France's centers and advances the game phase, transitioning from earlier phases like S1905M to later phases like W1907A and F1908M, while reducing the number of centers in earlier states.

steps: Assess current layout for setup opportunities
Place elements to prepare for future gains

FRANCE.name: Opening Explore
FRANCE.description: The skill increases France's centers from 3 to 4 and transitions the game phase to various diplomatic and war phases.

steps: Remove: world.phase=S1901M, world.units=F BRE, A MAR, A PAR

eff_del: world.units=F BRE, A MAR, A PAR

FRANCE.name: Orders Explore
FRANCE.description: The EXPLORE skill causes phase transitions and changes in unit configurations during the game.

preconditions: world.units=F MAO, A GAS, A PAR
steps: Issue EXPLORE order to a unit with F MAO
Wait for phase transition to W1902A
Confirm units have changed to A GAS, A PAR, F SPA/SC
Verify centers count is updated to 4
Check for event.centers_changed in the game log
Ensure no other phase or unit changes occur
success_criteria: Units are updated to A GAS, A PAR, F SPA/SC
Centers count is now 4 and event.centers_changed is recorded

eff_add: world.units=A GAS, A PAR, F SPA/SC
eff_del: world.units=F MAO, A GAS, A PAR

FRANCE.name: Orders Setup
FRANCE.description: The 'orders:SETUP' skill increases the number of centers controlled by France and transitions the game phase, often leading to changes in centers and units.

steps: Transfer 3 units from Germany to France

Remove: world.phase=F1906M, world.phase=W1906A, world.units=A KIE, A SIL, F NWY, A MUN, A PRU

Unit configurations are finalized and locked

ITALY.name: Late Orders Defend

Confirm phase transitions to F1907M, S1907M, S1908M

Italy retains control and center count
Units are updated to A MAR, A PIE, A APU

TURKEY.name: Late Orders Defend
TURKEY.description: The 'late_orders:DEFEND' skill transitions the game phase and maintains Turkey's control over 3 or 4 centers while altering unit configurations.

TURKEY.name: Late Orders Explore
TURKEY.description: The 'late_orders:EXPLORE' skill increases Turkey's centers to 5, advances the phase from F1905M to W1906A, and triggers changes in centers, phase, and units.

TURKEY.name: Late Orders Setup
TURKEY.description: The 'late_orders:SETUP' skill transitions the game phase and increases Turkey's centers from 3 to 5.

TURKEY.name: Opening Explore
TURKEY.description: The skill 'opening:EXPLORE' advances the game phase and increases Turkish units during the diplomacy phase.

TURKEY.name: Orders Explore
TURKEY.description: The EXPLORE skill causes a phase transition and changes unit configurations in the game, reflecting territorial and military shifts during the Ottoman Empire's expansion.

preconditions: world.units=F ANK, A CON, A SYR
steps: Issue order: EXPLORE to the Ottoman Army unit
Wait for phase transition to F1903M
Confirm units are updated to F ANK, A CON, A ARM
Issue order: EXPLORE to the Anatolian unit
Wait for phase transition to W1903A
Confirm units are updated to F ANK, A SMY, A SYR
Verify all phase transitions and unit changes are complete
success_criteria: Phase transitions to F1903M and W1903A are confirmed
Units are updated to F ANK, A CON, A ARM and then to F ANK, A SMY, A SYR
No errors during the phase and unit transitions

TURKEY.name: Orders Setup
TURKEY.description: The skill 'orders:SETUP' transitions the game phase and modifies unit configurations, primarily affecting Turkey's center count and unit holdings during the early 1900s.

steps: Assign 2 units to Turkey's central region
Adjust unit holdings to reflect new center count
Confirm phase transition to setup mode
success_criteria: Phase successfully transitioned to setup mode
Turkey's center count is correctly updated
